sky.description: Originally a Full Stack developer, I chose to step back and see the bigger picture. Today, I don't just code — I lead. My goal is to be the central pillar of your web projects: translating client needs into concrete solutions, coordinating talent, and supporting team growth.

mountain.title: My Journey
mountain.subtitle: Every step brings a new altitude

forest.title: My Skills
forest.subtitle: A dense and diverse forest of knowledge

lake.title: Let's stay in touch
lake.subtitle: A web project is a living ecosystem. If you'd like to discuss project management, technical leadership, or simply share a vision of tomorrow's web, feel free to reach out.
lake.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you shortly.
